headline: Trump's Rambo Colonel YEETS Iran Rescue 💥🦅🇺🇸
text:
US 🦅💥 PULLED OFF the BALLSIEST 😤🍒 CSAR OP EVER 🎖️🚁 after F-15E 🛩️🔥 got ZAPPED ⚡ by Iranian mullah SIMPS 🤡🇮🇷 over southern desert hellhole 🏜️😈! Trump 🍊👑 dropped the BOMBSHELL 💣📱 Sunday AM: 'Our COLONEL 🪖😎 was DEEP behind enemy lines 🏔️🚫, hunted by IRGC ragheads 🕌🔫 getting CLOSER by the HOUR ⏰😰 – now SAFE AF 📍✅!' Both crew YEETED 💨🪂 from the jet – pilot scooped EARLIER by A-10 Warthog BRRRRT 🚀🐗 squad, but one chopper took SMALL ARMS SPIT 👋🔫, crew dinged but LANDED THICC 🍑✈️!

Iran 🕌💦 racing US like it's a MIDNIGHT MADNESS 🏃‍♂️💨 chase for the WIZZO 🧑‍💻🎯 hiding 24+ HRS in MOUNTAIN CREVICE 🏔️🔭 with just a HANDCANNON 🔫💪 – CIA 🕵️‍♂️🔥 pulled DECEPTION MAGIC 🪄🤫, fake news 'he's ALREADY BAGGED 🛒🚫!' while DOZENS of US birds 🛩️🚁 SWARMED Iran airspace 🌌🦅 NO KIA ZERO! IRGC chads 🕌😤 claimed nomad goat-herders 🐐🔫 popped TWO Black Hawks 🌀💥 with rifles – BBC Verify SAID 'YUP' to vid of THREE Rambo-wannabes BLATing at choppers 🎥🔥 – new SAMs 🛡️🚀 flexing per IRNA 📰!

Details DRIPPING ☕💦: MASSIVE combat rescue in Kohgiluyeh 🏔️ or Khuzestan oilfields 🛢️🏭 – engagement POPPED OFF 💥👊 between Yanks and Persians, pilot maybe BUSTED UP 😵‍💫 from eject. Trump bragged 'TREACHEROUS mountains 🏔️😱, 24/7 EYES 👀📡 from Pentagon daddies 👨‍💼🤑!' CIA tracked his ASS 📍🕵️ to the Pentagon like GPS on a lost AirPod 🔍! Iran simped EARLIER 'WE WANT HIM ALIVE 🫂, REWARD for tips 💰🏆' but got SCHOOLED 😏📚!

Crew BADASSES 🪖💪 trained to GHOST 👻🏃‍♂️ from crash site, HIDE like ninjas 🥷, SURVIVE no food/water 🥤🚫 on local vibes 🌿 – Jennifer Kavanagh spilling tea ☕: 'Priority ONE: STAY ALIVE, NO CAPTURE ❌🔒!' F-15E dual-threat BEAST 🛩️💣 for drone-slaying 🦾🚫 and precision BOMB DROPS 🎯💥 – pilot + WIZZO tag-team dodging SAM HELL 🔥🛡️ in congested skies 🌤️😤!

IRGC state TV crowed FRIDAY 'WE SMOKED the Yankee jet 🛩️💨!' over nomad lands 🐐🏔️ or Arab/Persian mix-zone Khuzestan 🛢️🇮🇷 – but Uncle Sam said 'HOLD MY FREEDOM EAGLE 🦅🍔' and SNATCHED their prize 🏆😤! Trump-MAGA energy MAXED 🔴🗽, Iran coping HARD 😭🤡 – this CSAR SLAY was PURE HOLLYWOOD Rambo remix 🎥🍿 with ZERO American blood 💉🚫! WW3 teases? NAH, just US DOMINANCE 📈🇺🇸 flexing on ayatollah cucks 🕌😩!
